name: Shennan Circuit Company Limited
summary: Shennan Circuit Company Limited designs, manufactures, and sells printed circuit boards, packaging substrates, and electronic assemblies in China and internationally. The company was formerly known as CATIC Shenzhen Shennan Circuit Company and changed its name to Shennan Circuit Company Limited in January 2000. Shennan Circuit Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
